title: Inferno
description: Addon mod for Isle of Berk that adds dragon scale armor, inferno & food
body:
## **THIS MOD REQUIRES ISLE OF BERK**

**FULL CREDIT TO ISLE OF BERK TEAM FOR ANY ASSETS THIS MOD USES FROM ISLE OF BERK TO ENHANCE THE EXPERIENCE / PLEASE USE JEI FOR RECIPES / IN RECENT NEWS ISLE OF BERK WILL NOLONGER CONTINUE DEVELOPEMENT THIS MOD WILL CONTINUE TO BE WORKED ON UNTIL I RUN OUT OF IDEAS AND PORT TO WHATEVER OTHER HTTYD MOD I SEE FIT IN THE FUTURE. ISLE OF BERK IS LOCATED ON [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/isle-of-berk)**

---

This is an addon mod for [Isle of Berk](https://modrinth.com/mod/isle-of-berk) that adds various items from meats to dragon scale armour.![Night Fury Nest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b777b8e3924d36ab9e06f7dad329df8b9ee3e1d.png)

**Dragon Nests:**

Dragon nests can spawn naturally throughout the landscape in their respective biomes, each nest comes with a default rate of 3% chance to spawn this can be edited in the config. Dragon nests come with atleast one parent and one dragon egg so make sure to keep an eye out!![Night Fury & Player with scale armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e81149f9514c128a9a68c990125fb38a09a01243.png)


**Dragon Scale Armour & Inferno:**

Dragon scale armour can be obtained through crafting although you will first need to obtain the respective armours dragon scales each dragon has a set amount of time for them to shed scales or you can kill them for a sum of scales, dragon scale armour provides resistance to fire and allows an elytra like flight!

The Inferno sword can be obtained through crafting, this sword has 3 different modes sheathed/blade/flame each mode has its own attack values and speeds and are all compatible with better combat, while the blade is sheathed you can shoot a gas projectile this will inflict gas upon the victim anything that has this effect and is lit on fire will explode!![Collectable Dragon Heads](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6884e67f96a1d92a751da78ee4ef461070861c31.jpeg)

**Dragon Heads & Drops:**

Dragon heads can be dropped by all dragons at a very low rate being 10% these heads can be placed upon walls as trophies!, all dragons can drop other items such as their respective class of meat I.E striker meat for night fury or other items such as a deadly nadder being able to drop their spines to throw at people!, for more in depth info on drop rates check Pastebin.![Dragon Hunter Ship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/893cc4f9af5bde55991b06ddeef49e075dfd45bb.jpeg)

**Dragon Hunters:**

Dragon hunter ships can spawn throughout the oceans in 2 variants one being the normal and the other being the attacked variant each have their own unique look and loot!, dragon hunters are very poweful opponents holding atleast 1 dragon with one by default being a rare albino variant the spawn rate for these ships can be altered in the config.


---
